workflow.name: profile-readme-automation
workflow.description: DAG orchestrated README automation for profile content

failure_policy: continue-on-error + retry + timeout cancel + dead-letter on exhaust

operations.name: priority-sort
operations.summary: Ready tasks are ordered by priority, scheduled_at, then task name.

operations.name: deferred-release-gate
operations.summary: Tasks stay deferred until their scheduled time is reached.

operations.name: dependency-readiness-check
operations.summary: Only dependency-complete tasks can enter the dispatch queue.

operations.name: retry-backoff-reschedule
operations.summary: Failed or timed-out tasks are re-queued using each worker's retry backoff.

operations.name: dead-letter-capture
operations.summary: Exhausted failures are persisted to dead-letters.json for inspection.

store_features.name: dag-snapshot-json
store_features.summary: The resolved dependency graph is persisted to .github/manager/state/dag.json.

store_features.name: scheduler-snapshot-json
store_features.summary: Scheduler policy, ready queue, and queue depth are persisted to .github/manager/state/scheduler.json.

store_features.name: runtime-state-json
store_features.summary: The orchestrator persists workflow, worker, and task state to .github/manager/state/state.json.

store_features.name: queue-snapshot-json
store_features.summary: Ready, deferred, retry, running, and terminal queue views are persisted to .github/manager/state/queue.json.

store_features.name: event-log-json
store_features.summary: Published workflow events are persisted to .github/manager/state/event-log.json.

store_features.name: dead-letter-json
store_features.summary: Exhausted task failures are preserved in .github/manager/state/dead-letters.json.

store_features.name: metadata-manifest-json
store_features.summary: Document inventory, write batches, and store consistency are tracked in .github/manager/state/metadata-store.json.

integration_options.name: state-json-timeline
integration_options.summary: Published events are appended to event_bus.recent_events in runtime state.

integration_options.name: readme-console-refresh
integration_options.summary: Event activity is rendered back into the README automation console.

integration_options.name: github-actions-annotations
integration_options.summary: Failures and skipped sections are surfaced through workflow warnings and logs.
